title: Algerian Chicken Tagine
description: A classic Algerian dish made with chicken, spices, and dried fruits. This tagine is a hearty and flavorful stew that's perfect for any occasion.

ingredients.name: Algerian tagine spice blend
ingredients.notes: Available at most Middle Eastern markets

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the pot and set aside.
Add more oil if necessary, then add the onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the tagine spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add the apricots, almonds, and chicken back to the pot.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, until the chicken is cooked through, about 20-25 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley, if desired.
